test-method.name: verifyVerificationPageUrl
test-method.description: Precondition: User should be logged in and on the healthapp section 1. Login in the healthapp application 2. Scroll down menu till verification 3. Click on the verification

exception.message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : undefined} (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.117): undefined Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '13.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [4d45f7b75058edea52ffb4e268bbdef1, findElement {using=xpath, value=//a[@href='#/Verification']}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.117, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ABHI\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65432}, goog:processID: 27484, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65432/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.117, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 4d45f7b75058edea52ffb4e268bbdef1

test-method.name: verifyVerificationSubModules
test-method.description: Precondition: User should be logged in and on the Verification section\n" + "1. Click on the Verification Module drop-down arrow\n" + "2. Click on Order

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at testcases.verification_testcase.verifyVerificationSubModules(verification_testcase.java:75) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:567) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:628) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:830)

test-method.name: verifyInventoryTabsAndButtonsAreDisplayed
test-method.description: Precondition: User should be logged in and on the Verification section\n" + "1. Click on the Verification Module drop-down arrow\n" + "2. Click on Inventory + "3. Click on Requisition

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at testcases.verification_testcase.verifyInventoryTabsAndButtonsAreDisplayed(verification_testcase.java:94) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:567) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:628) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:830)

test-method.name: verifyPharmacyTabIsActiveOrNot
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on verification module 1. Click on the inventory 2. Click on the pharmacy 3. User should navigate to the pharmacy section from the inventory section

exception.message: Pharmacy page is not active expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Pharmacy page is not active expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at testcases.verification_testcase.verifyPharmacyTabIsActiveOrNot(verification_testcase.java:128) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:567) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:628) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:830)

test-method.name: verifyNavigationOfTabs
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on verification module 1. Click on the inventory 2. Click on the pharmacy 3. User should navigate to the pharmacy section from the inventory section

exception.message: Purchase Request Tab is not active expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Purchase Request Tab is not active expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at testcases.verification_testcase.verifyNavigationOfTabs(verification_testcase.java:140) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:567) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:628) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:830)

test-method.name: verifyTheResultsDateRangeIsWithinTheSelectedRange
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on Requisition section1. Click on the "From" date2. Select the "From" date3. Click on the "To" date4. Select "To" date5. Click on "OK" button

test-method.name: verifyToolTipText
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on Inventory > Requisition section 1. Hover the mouse over the star/favourite icon. 2. Verify that a tooltip with the text "Remember this date" appears when hovering over the star.

exception.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//i[contains(@class,'icon-favourite')]"} (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.117) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '13.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [4d45f7b75058edea52ffb4e268bbdef1, findElement {using=xpath, value=//i[contains(@class,'icon-favourite')]}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.117, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ABHI\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65432}, goog:processID: 27484, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65432/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.117, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 4d45f7b75058edea52ffb4e268bbdef1

test-method.name: verifyDatesAreRemeberedCorrectly
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on Inventory > Requisition section 1. Hover the mouse over the star/favourite icon. 2. Verify that a tooltip with the text "Remember this date" appears when hovering over the star.

exception.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"(//input[@id='date'])[1]"} (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.117) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '13.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [4d45f7b75058edea52ffb4e268bbdef1, findElement {using=xpath, value=(//input[@id='date'])[1]}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.117, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ABHI\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65432}, goog:processID: 27484, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65432/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.117, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 4d45f7b75058edea52ffb4e268bbdef1

test-method.name: verifyResultDataIsAsPerTheSelectedDateRange
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on verification module 1. Click on the data range button 2. Select"one week" option from the drop down 3. Click on "OK" button
